description: Complete redesign of index.html with masterpiece quality UI, navigation buttons at top linking to each card section, accordion effect on each card for clean expandable content, and footer with @petrusjakub credit linking to Instagram. All content/links must come from the source converted HTML file.
steps: Completely rewrite /projects/sandbox/List-penting/index.html with a masterpiece-quality redesigned page

Extract ALL content and links from the source file 'Manulife File Penting - Directory Per 02 Juni 2026 (2)-converted.html' - this includes Section I (14 products), Section II (Financing, Keagenan & AAJI, Kompensasi, Manu Pro/MABC/Billionaire), and Section III (Starter Kit with Selling Tools, Recruiting Tools, Submit Tools)
At the very top of the page, create a navigation bar with buttons/pills that link to each card section below (use anchor links with smooth scrolling)
Each product/section card must use an accordion effect - clickable header that expands/collapses the content beneath it, making the page look clean and organized
Design must be masterpiece quality: modern, clean, professional with Manulife green brand colors, smooth animations, glass morphism or gradient effects, responsive design
Use Google Fonts (Inter or similar), CSS variables for theming, smooth transitions for accordion open/close
At the very bottom of the page, add footer text: 'edited by @petrusjakub' where 'petrusjakub' links to https://instagram.com/petrusjakub, and include 'copyright 2026'
All links must open in new tabs (target=_blank)
Ensure the page is fully responsive (mobile-friendly)
Use only inline CSS and JS (single HTML file, no external dependencies except CDN fonts)
acceptance_criteria: Page has navigation buttons at top that scroll to respective card sections
Each card uses accordion expand/collapse interaction
All 14 products from Section I are present with correct links from the converted HTML source
Section II (Financing, Keagenan & AAJI, Kompensasi, Manu Pro/MABC/Billionaire) is present with correct links
Section III (Starter Kit - Selling Tools, Recruiting Tools, Submit Tools) is present with correct links
Footer shows 'edited by @petrusjakub' with petrusjakub linking to https://instagram.com/petrusjakub and copyright 2026
Design is modern, clean, professional (masterpiece quality)
Page is responsive and works on mobile
All external links open in new tab
verification: Open index.html and confirm visual quality and layout
Verify navigation buttons at top scroll to correct sections
Verify footer contains @petrusjakub Instagram link and copyright 2026
Spot-check that links match the source converted HTML file
